Name: DEMO_SPOT_LIGHT_PARAM
Description: Defines configuration for spotlight behavior in demo scenes, including position, color, cone shape, range, shadowing, and flicker effects.

Fields.Name: Position: X
Fields.Description: X-axis offset of the spotlight position.

Fields.Name: Position: Y
Fields.Description: Y-axis offset of the spotlight position.

Fields.Name: Position: Z
Fields.Description: Z-axis offset of the spotlight position.

Fields.Name: Diffuse: Red
Fields.Description: Red channel of the diffuse light color.

Fields.Name: Diffuse: Green
Fields.Description: Green channel of the diffuse light color.

Fields.Name: Diffuse: Blue
Fields.Description: Blue channel of the diffuse light color.

Fields.Name: Diffuse: Alpha
Fields.Description: Intensity/opacity component of the diffuse light.

Fields.Name: Specular: Red
Fields.Description: Red channel of the specular highlight color.

Fields.Name: Specular: Green
Fields.Description: Green channel of the specular highlight color.

Fields.Name: Specular: Blue
Fields.Description: Blue channel of the specular highlight color.

Fields.Name: Specular: Alpha
Fields.Description: Intensity component of the specular highlight.

Fields.Name: Near Distance
Fields.Description: Distance at which the spotlight begins affecting objects.

Fields.Name: Far Distance
Fields.Description: Maximum distance at which the spotlight has effect.

Fields.Name: Width
Fields.Description: Horizontal spread of the spotlight cone.

Fields.Name: Height
Fields.Description: Vertical spread of the spotlight cone.

Fields.Name: Priority
Fields.Description: Rendering or evaluation priority of the spotlight.

Fields.Name: Shadow Strength
Fields.Description: Controls intensity of shadows cast by the spotlight.

Fields.Name: Blink Duration: Maximum
Fields.Description: Maximum duration of light flicker cycles.

Fields.Name: Blink Duration: Minimum
Fields.Description: Minimum duration of light flicker cycles.

Fields.Name: Blink Intensity
Fields.Description: Strength of spotlight flickering effect.

Fields.Name: Enable Shadow Casting
Fields.Description: Determines whether the spotlight casts shadows.
